ShortDescription.Value: AdvancedTPM - Advanced Tax and Production Manager

Publish.LongDescription:
Take Absolute Control of Your City's Economy
Advanced Tax and Production Manager (AdvancedTPM) is an all-in-one economic dashboard covering taxes, production, companies, residential zones, districts, and services.
## Residential Browser
Filter and sort every residential building in your city by density, level, district, theme, asset pack, occupancy, happiness, and more.
The browser supports all content without needing a mod update. Base Game buildings, DLC region packs, themed content, and custom creator packs all appear automatically. If a content pack provides a filter icon the mod uses it, exactly as it appears in the game menus. New packs added in future game updates will show up on their own.
- Native icon integration. Theme and pack filters pull icons directly from the game's internal image system. - Pack placement counts. The summary table shows how many buildings from each installed content pack are on your map, split by density tier. - Dual camera actions per row: jump to the building on the map, or focus it in the game info panel. - 50 buildings per page for fast rendering in very large cities. - Live updates pause when a row is expanded so the detail view stays stable. - Intelligent asset resolution. The backend checks asset pack data, zone types, native DLC requirements, and Paradox Mods metadata so no custom building is missed. - Smart name normalization. Internal PascalCase names are automatically split into readable text and redundant file tags are stripped so filter lists look clean. - Multi-pack support. If an asset belongs to multiple packs the UI lines up all associated icons side-by-side. - High-performance caching. Pack lookups are calculated once and cached for instant reuse, keeping navigation smooth.
## Tax and Production Dashboard
- Per-resource tax sliders for 50+ resources across raw materials, industrial goods, immaterial services, commercial retail, and entertainment. - Real-time production and consumption bars with surplus and deficit indicators. - Resources grouped by supply chain category. - Per-resource and total tax income with in-game currency formatting. - Workforce stats and demand signals per resource.
## Company Browser
- Sortable and filterable table by zone, profitability tier, profit range, or text search. - Expand any row for brand name, address, level, zone, output and input resources, staffing bars, and full efficiency breakdown with CS2 icons. - Company happiness score in rows and detail panels. - Signature building detection. All known DLC signature buildings are flagged and used by the Advisor. - Click to jump the camera to any company building.
## Districts Dashboard
- Reorderable district cards with demographic metrics and district-level policies. - Happiness aggregation per district.
## Services Browser
- Filterable panel for city service buildings with live metrics.
## Auto-Tax Engine
- 6-factor scoring balancing profitability, happiness, production, demand, company count, and tax income. - Per-resource min and max ranges. Lock specific resources from auto-adjustment. - Profitability weight slider for finer control over the scoring formula.
## Adaptive Learning Advisor
- Learns sensitivity, income response, production impact, and volatility per resource over time. - Confidence-weighted recommendations with full decision log. - Persistent profiles saved to disk and loaded between sessions.
## Performance
Built for the Cohtml engine using direct-DOM manipulation. UI thread cost is approximately 1.3ms with no measurable impact on game FPS. Paginated lists and a concurrent prefab cache keep navigation instant in any city size.
Publish.ChangeLog:
## v1.1.4 - The Residential and Custom Content Update
### New Features - Residential Browser: A new dashboard to track all residential buildings, occupancy, and demographics across the city. - Native Custom Content Tracking: Automatically tracks Base Game buildings, official DLCs, region packs, and Paradox Mods custom creator packs. No mod update needed for new content. - Native Icon Integration: Theme and pack filters pull icons directly from the game's internal image system. DLC and creator pack icons display exactly as they appear in the game menus. - Pack Placement Dashboard: Summary table showing how many residential buildings from each installed content pack are on the map, broken down by density. - Dual Go Actions: Jump the camera to a building's physical location or focus the building in the native info panel.
### Performance and Stability - Strict UI Pagination: Data tables now render exactly 50 rows per page, eliminating UI lag in massive cities. - Auto-Pause Data Sync: Expanding a row in the browser pauses live updates for that element, keeping data stable while reading. - Prefab Caching System: Concurrent caching for asset pack lookups reduces main-thread CPU spikes during UI generation. - Smart Name Normalization: PascalCase asset names are automatically split into readable text and redundant file tags are stripped. - Signature tab icon rendering fixed. Full DLC building whitelist complete. - Fixed UI clipping in panel dropdowns. - Fixed window dragging getting stuck after release. - Resolved compilation errors in school, hospital, and garbage data extraction.
## v1.1.3 - Residential Browser and Custom Asset Tracking
### Added - Residential Browser: Filterable and sortable panel for all residential zones. - Custom asset pack detection and grouping with PackIcon headers. - District-level demographics and household stats.
### Fixed - Base Game icon now shows the correct Paradox Star icon for vanilla assets. - Theme names for custom assets are preserved as authored. - Zero-allocation buffer optimization for building data parsing.
